examples: The freethinking of one age is the common sense of the next.
But this was a sign of mass voting from Turkey, not of a freethinking boom.
This is an example of two cultures with different attitudes towards creativity and freethinking.
The Robinsons went to church occasionally, but if they subscribed to any credo it was that of freethinking.
So they vote rather boldly to form a union of their own, a separate subcaste of freethinking writer-warriors to be known as Kayasthas.
